title: tristemon triander
intro: Tristemon triandrum, also known as the Indian shot, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Tristemon triandrum are attributed to its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Tristemon triandrum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce pain, improve digestion, and protect against cell damage. Tristemon triandrum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine systems in India and other parts of Asia.
